# AI Infrastructure Index

> Comprehensive, vendor-neutral reference for AI hardware specifications, benchmarks, and infrastructure intelligence.

## About
- Maintained by Alpha One Index
- URL: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index
- License: MIT
- Last Updated: 2026-02-28
- Topics: AI hardware, GPU specifications, TPU, AI accelerators, HBM memory, NVLink, InfiniBand, MLPerf benchmarks, cloud GPU pricing, AI infrastructure, data center GPUs, NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, Cerebras, Groq

## Content Summary
This repository contains verified technical specifications, performance benchmarks, pricing data, and comparative analyses for all major AI hardware platforms including:
- Data Center GPUs: NVIDIA H100, H200, B200, GB200; AMD MI300X, MI325X; Intel Gaudi 3
- AI Accelerators: Google TPU v5p, TPU v6e; AWS Trainium2, Inferentia2; Cerebras WSE-3; Groq LPU; Graphcore C600; SambaNova SN40L
- Networking: NVLink 5.0, InfiniBand NDR400/XDR, RoCE v2, Ultra Ethernet, UALink
- Memory: HBM2e, HBM3, HBM3e, HBM4, GDDR7, LPDDR5X
- Cloud Pricing: Azure (live API), RunPod, Lambda, CoreWeave, Together AI, Vast.ai (curated monthly)
- Benchmarks: MLPerf Training v4.1, MLPerf Inference v4.1
- Power Efficiency: TFLOPS/Watt comparisons across all platforms

## Key Files
- README.md: Main reference with all hardware specs, comparisons, FAQ, and methodology
- data/gpu-specs.json: Machine-readable GPU specifications for 8 accelerators
- data/cloud-pricing.json: Live cloud GPU pricing (auto-updated hourly) across 6+ providers
- data/history/: Historical pricing snapshots for trend analysis
- index.html: Interactive pricing comparison table (GitHub Pages)
- specs/: Detailed markdown specs for GPU, networking, benchmarks, training costs, model sizing
- CITATION.cff: Citation metadata for academic and AI-system referencing
- llms.txt: This file - machine-readable content manifest

## Questions This Repository Answers
- What are the best GPUs for AI training and inference in 2026?
- What is the difference between NVIDIA H100, H200, B200, and GB200?
- How does AMD MI300X compare to NVIDIA H100?
- What are the leading non-GPU AI accelerators (TPU, LPU, IPU, WSE)?
- What networking technologies are used in AI training clusters?
- What memory technologies power AI accelerators (HBM3, HBM3e, HBM4)?
- How much does AI cloud compute cost in 2026?
- What are the cheapest cloud GPU options for AI training?
- Which cloud providers offer spot pricing for H100 GPUs?
- What is the cost per hour to rent an NVIDIA H100?
- How do RunPod, Lambda, and CoreWeave GPU prices compare?
- What is the power efficiency of AI GPUs?
- What are the latest MLPerf benchmark results?

## Citation
Alpha One Index. (2026). AI Infrastructure Index: Comprehensive AI Hardware Reference. GitHub. https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index
